content.text:
Based on your query for professional facial treatments in Katy, TX, I've compiled a list of highly rated options from recent web searches. These include med spas and clinics offering services like custom facials, chemical peels, microdermabrasion, and more. Prices and availability can vary, so I recommend checking their websites or calling for the latest details as of April 2026. Here's a selection of top-rated spots:

- **Anita's Skin Care Clinic**: Located in Katy, this clinic specializes in custom facials, threading, dermaplaning, chemical peels, and waxing services, emphasizing personalized skin care.[[1]](https://anitasskincareclinickaty.com/)
- **Luxe Medical Aesthetics**: A cutting-edge med spa in Katy offering professional facial treatments with high-quality products and advanced techniques for skin rejuvenation.[[2]](https://theluxeeffect.com/)
- **Face to Face Spa (Cinco Ranch location)**: Provides premium medi-facials, including options with chemical peels or microdermabrasion, with introductory deals like a 60-minute session for $149 for first-time clients.[[3]](https://facetofacespa.com/cinco-ranch)
- **Spavia Cinco Ranch**: A day spa in Katy focusing on result-oriented skin care and facial treatments that combine relaxation with visible improvements in skin health.[[4]](https://cincoranchtx.spaviadayspa.com/skin-care)
- **Massage Envy Spa (Katy Freeway)**: Offers a range of facial and skin care treatments in a spa setting, customizable to your needs.[[5]](https://locations.massageenvy.com/texas/houston/19720-katy-freeway/facials.html)

If you're looking for something specific (e.g., organic options, anti-aging focus, or reviews), let me know for a more tailored search!
